productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Blue Check Shirt
description: Style NoteThis checked shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look.Product DetailsBlue checked shirt with hints of white, red and grey, has a medium spread collar with a buttoned front placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid buttons, patch pocket on the left chest, embroidered branding on the left pocket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
